---
name: New Site Parser
about: Request support for a new e-commerce site
title: "[Parser] Add support for "
labels: new-parser
assignees: ''
---

**Site name and URL**
e.g., Walmart — https://www.walmart.com

**Example product page**
Link to a product page on the site:

**Price location**
Where is the price displayed on the page? (e.g., near the "Add to Cart" button, in a sidebar)

**Notes**
Any additional context (e.g., the site uses dynamic loading, has multiple price formats, etc.)
